title: FeeCurrencyModalityTypeValues
description: Describes the currency context in which the fee is applied.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fixed Currency
x-enumeration-literals.description: Fee is always applied in a specific currency (e.g. always in USD).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Transaction Currency
x-enumeration-literals.description: Fee is in the same currency as the transaction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Account Currency
x-enumeration-literals.description: Fee is in the currency of the debited account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Converted Currency
x-enumeration-literals.description: Fee defined in one currency but converted to another using FX.
